findings.description: The interface name `Initializable` is referenced in the s3 section content ("ValidationManager は Initializable を実装しているため") but is absent from the s3 hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source: "ValidationManager クラスは初期化が必要なため、:ref:`repository_initialize` に記述した Initializable インタフェースを実装している。"

findings.description: `Form` is referenced in the s2 section content as the target entity that converters/validators are associated with, but is not present in the s2 hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source: "ValidationManager から Form に対応付けて自動的に呼び出される" — knowledge s2 preserves this text but omits `Form` from hints.
